generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects real-time temperature data from building environments using IoT sensors integrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects real-time humidity data from building environments using IoT sensors integrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Detects occupancy status in building spaces using IoT sensors integrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks energy consumption metrics from building systems using IoT sensors integrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance SystemAlertSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Generates operational alerts from building control systems using IoT sensors integrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SystemAlertDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance SystemAlertDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemAlertSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically rich 3D model representing building geometry, topology, and component relationships as the semantic backbone for modeling and deployment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnabler, ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Embedded control strategies for building systems (e.g., lighting control, HVAC optimization) defined within the BIM environment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D representation for monitoring and simulation using Unreal Engine."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data collected from building environments."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data collected from building environments."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status data from building spaces."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance LightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting system data including conditions and status."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics from building systems."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance SystemAlertData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational alerts generated from building control systems."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemAlertDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance OperationalLogsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical operational logs including energy consumption and system alerts."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) serving as the semantic backbone for modeling and deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, StakeholderCollaborationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for automating domain semantics extraction and generating runtime artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlLogicExecutionService, AdaptiveLearningService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlLogicExecutionService, AdaptiveLearningService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for real-time data synchronization and bidirectional communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlLogicExecutionService, AdaptiveLearningService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine for rich, interactive 3D visualization and monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, StakeholderCollaborationService
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPointsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points for modular service integration and scalability."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlLogicExecutionService, AdaptiveLearningService, SimulationService, StakeholderCollaborationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time monitoring and visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine for interactive 3D visualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, OperationalStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs predictive analytics and optimization for energy efficiency, visual comfort, and health effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyInsight, OccupantComfortInsight, HealthEffectsInsight, OptimizationRecommendationAction
]

instance ControlLogicExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes automated control logic such as lighting control via TwinLight."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingControlAction, HVACControlAction
]

instance AdaptiveLearningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements adaptive learning using reinforcement learning for dynamic control policies in BOREALIS."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlRecommendationAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables simulation and scenario testing for evaluating design changes or operational strategies."
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignChangeEvaluationInsight, OperationalStrategyInsight
]

instance StakeholderCollaborationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facilitates communication between facility managers, engineers, and DT engineers."
    DTDFVocab:provides CollaborationDashboardInsight
]

]

]

]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true

]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded lighting system actuator enabling control of lighting levels and settings in response to DT commands."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded HVAC system actuator enabling control of temperature and air quality settings in response to DT commands."
]

instance BuildingControlSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "General building control system actuators for operational adjustments based on DT recommendations."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends **control signals and commands** back to the physical building infrastructure to adjust operational parameters. This includes:
  - **Actuator commands** (e.g., adjusting lighting levels, HVAC settings).
  - **Control logic execution** (e.g., automated responses to sensor data).
  - **Feedback loops** for adaptive control systems (e.g., reinforcement learning-based optimization in the BOREALIS project).
  The framework ensures that these interactions are seamless and synchronized with the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**, with continuous synchronization between the physical and virtual worlds. The framework supports:
  - **Real-time data exchange** (via Eclipse Hono and Ditto).
  - **Periodic updates** for non-critical data or batch processing.
  - **Adaptive synchronization** based on operational needs (e.g., high-frequency updates for critical systems like safety or energy management)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **modular, service-oriented platform** with the following components:
  - **BIM-based core**: The foundational model representing the building and its components.
  - **Middleware layer**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data synchronization.
  - **Control and analytics layer**: Custom services for optimization, simulation, and adaptive learning.
  - **Visualization layer**: Unreal Engine for immersive monitoring and interaction.
  - **Extension layer**: Standardized interfaces for integrating third-party services or custom plugins.
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** and **interoperability** across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the **entire lifecycle of the building**, including:
  - **Design phase**: Leveraging BIM models to create a virtual representation of the building as designed.
  - **Construction phase**: Integrating as-built data and real-time construction progress tracking.
  - **Operation phase**: Continuous synchronization with the physical building, including real-time monitoring, control, and optimization.
  - **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: Supporting updates to the DT as the building undergoes changes (e.g., renovations, expansions).
  The DT is designed to evolve alongside the physical asset, ensuring long-term compatibility and adaptability."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The framework addresses fidelity and validity through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies how well the DT reflects the physical system, ensuring high fidelity.
  - **Validation mechanisms**: Automated checks for data consistency and synchronization accuracy.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Handling sensor errors, data gaps, or delays in real-time updates.
  - **Verification processes**: Ensuring that generated artifacts (e.g., control logic, visualization) meet functional and non-functional requirements.
  The framework also supports **semantic drift mitigation** (e.g., via synchronization techniques) to maintain alignment between the DT and the physical system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for technical connectivity between the physical twin (PT) and the virtual twin (DT). These middleware components facilitate:
    - **Real-time data exchange** via standardized protocols.
    - **Bidirectional communication** for sensor data ingestion and control signal transmission.
    The connection architecture is designed to support **scalable deployment** across heterogeneous building systems, with minimal manual configuration required. The use of **Hono/Ditto** ensures compliance with industry standards for IoT and cyber-physical systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system supports **automated deployment** through a **model-driven pipeline** that:
  - Extracts **asset data and metadata** from **validated BIM models**.
  - Generates **runtime configurations** for **Hono/Ditto middleware** and **Unreal Engine visualization**.
  - Deploys **modular services** via **standardized extension points**, enabling **scalable and reproducible setups**.
  The system does not specify **hosting environments** (e.g., cloud, edge, or hybrid) but prioritizes **low-overhead updates** and **modular deployment** to support **long-term operability** in AECO."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT framework supports **standardized integration mechanisms** to exchange information with external systems, though specific examples (e.g., ERP, CMMS) are not detailed in the document. The architecture is designed for **modularity and interoperability**, allowing for seamless integration with AECO-specific tools and workflows. The use of **BIM as a semantic backbone** and **Hono/Ditto for middleware** ensures compatibility with industry standards."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "The document does not explicitly address **data ownership and privacy**, but the framework implies:
  - **Ownership**: Likely aligned with the building owner or facility manager, given the focus on operational control.
  - **Privacy considerations**: Not detailed, but real-time data collection from sensors may raise ethical concerns (e.g., occupancy tracking). The framework would need to incorporate **GDPR or other regulatory compliance** mechanisms."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to:
  - **BIM standards**: For modeling and data representation.
  - **Middleware standards**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto support open standards for IoT and digital twin management.
  - **Model-driven engineering (MDE) principles**: For automation and interoperability.
  - **Extension points**: Standardized interfaces for modular integration."
]
